title: abildgaardia humilis
intro: Abildgaardia humilis, also known as the Lesser Caltrop or Lesser Thornapple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Capparaceae. It is native to Africa and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Abildgaardia humilis is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions or decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
